name: Non-record: 13L INT4 attn — slow steps, worse BPB
blurb: Experiment: 13-layer model with INT4 attention (INT6→INT4 to free space for extra layer). Result: 172.8ms/step vs 148ms for 12L VE, only 3485 steps in 10 min. ttt_bpb=1.1640, worse than 12L INT4 VE (1.1574). Conclusion: extra layer does not compensate for step overhead — consistent with community finding that 12L+ at seq2048 is worse than 11L. INT4 attn penalty is too high.
author: Harsh Soni
